info.title: DVoituron.Tools.Swagger2Markdown
info.description:
Tool to display or generate markdown document with a list of APIs defined by a 'swagger.json' file.
Example: `Swagger2Markdown --filename=https://mysite.com/swagger/v1/swagger.json`

options.name: --filename
options.description: Required. Swagger.json filename to read (local or URL).

options.name: --type
options.description:
(Default: Summary) Type of report to display (Summary,
MultipleMarkdown)

options.name: --target
options.description:
(Default: swagger) (Default, 'swagger') Local folder to
write all generated files (summary.md and multiple markdown
files).
